children.heading: Expansion of Black Canyon of the Gunnison Wilderness
children.label: a Expansion of Black Canyon of the Gunnison Wilderness
children.text: The Black Canyon of the Gunnison Wilderness, as established by subsection (b) of the first section of (), is expanded to include the parcel of land depicted on the Map as “Tract A” and consisting of approximately 4,419 acres.Public Law 94–56790 Stat. 2692

children.heading: Administration
children.label: b Administration
children.text: The Black Canyon of the Gunnison Wilderness shall be administered as a component of the Park.
